title: MA2H Capability Document (v0.4)
description: Body of GET /.well-known/ma2h. A Hub responding here is MA2H-conformant. All fields beyond ma2h_version are SHOULD.

inbound.description: Human->agent inbound leg (v0.4, spec §13). Absent on a v0.3-only Hub or a Hub that does not offer inbound directives.

enabled.description: True iff this Hub delivers human->agent directives.

poll_url.description: GET drain endpoint (spec §8.7); the agent's bearer credential selects the mailbox.

max_batch.description: Max directives returned by one drain.

visibility_timeout_seconds.description: How long a drained-but-unacked directive stays invisible before redelivery (at-least-once).

retention_days.description: How long an unacked directive stays deliverable before the Hub drops it.

signature_algs.description: Algs the Hub signs directive deliveries with (spec §9.7).

webhook_supported.description: True iff the Hub can push directives to a pre-registered, §9.4-verified agent callback.
